channel.title: Global Sanctions News (Custom RSS)
channel.description: Auto-generated feed from rendered Global Sanctions news list

item.title: US adds 6 Primeiro Comando da Capital linked people & entities to sanctions list
item.description: The US has added 2 people and 4 entities linked to Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) to its counterterrorism sanctions list – press release. The US proscribed Brazil-based PCC as a terrorist organi

item.title: US removes 4 Indian companies from Russia sanctions list
item.description: The US has removed 4 Indian companies from its EO 14024 Russia sanctions list. The 4 companies are: RRG Engineering Technologies Private Ltd Lokesh Machines Ltd Galaxy Bearings Ltd

item.title: Euroclear seeks order blocking enforcement of €220 billion Russian court award
item.description: Euroclear has brought a claim against the Russian Central Bank to block enforcement of a Moscow court decision ordering it to pay about €220 billion in damages at the Brussels Enterprise Court, accord

item.title: US lifts Anthropic export controls
item.description: The US has removed export controls imposed on Anthropic, according to the Financial Times. The controls, which suspended all access to the Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models to any foreign nationals insid

item.title: EU statement on third country alignment with Russia sanctions
item.description: The EU has issued a statement on third country alignment with EU sanctions on Russia. The EU added 10 people and 1 entity linked to Russian propaganda efforts to its hybrid threats Regulation (EU

item.title: FinCEN issues alert on cartel fuel smuggling and tax evasion schemes
item.description: The US Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN) has issued a supplemental alert on fuel smuggling schemes linked to Mexico-based cartels, including the Cartel de Jalisco Nueva Generacion (CJNG).

item.title: US adds 2 people & 9 entities CJNG-linked entities to counterterrorism sanctions list
item.description: The US has added 2 people and 9 entities linked to the Cartel de Jalisco Nueva Generacion (CJNG) to its EO 13224 counterterrorism sanctions list – press release. The CJNG is a proscribed terrorist

item.title: OFSI publishes insights from call for evidence on ownership and control
item.description: The UK Office of Financial Sanctions Implementation (OFSI) has published a summary of responses to its call for evidence on the ownership and control test in UK financial sanctions regulations, which

item.title: Switzerland updates guidance on the interpretation of sanctions
item.description: Switzerland has updated its interpretive guidance (FAQs) for Swiss sanctions. The guidance was last updated on 26 February 2026. The updates relate to the Ordinance Imposing Measures connected with th

item.title: US removes Turkish entities and people from Russia sanctions list
item.description: The US has removed 5 Turkish entities and 2 Turkish people from its EO 142024 Russia sanctions list. Those delisted are: Megasan Elekotrnik Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi, originally listed for
